name: Welcome to EasyAI
description: A friendly welcome prompt to help you get started with EasyAI
content:
Welcome to EasyAI! 🎉

I'm your AI assistant, ready to help you with:
- Code reviews and debugging
- Writing and communication
- Data analysis and insights
- Creative projects and brainstorming
- Learning and research

What would you like to work on today? Just describe your task and I'll help you get started!

Tip: You can create custom prompts by editing files in the prompts/ folder or using the UI dashboard.
